title: Ask Merl!
description: This is a simple parody datapack of the "I don't know" Minecraft.net support AI, Merl. (NOT connected to the real AI!)
body:
## What does the datapack? - Adds the `/trigger ask-merl` command - When used a Merl mannequin spawns nearby - On interaction opens a dialog menu and you can ask Merl questions... ---
---
## Note: This isn't a serious datapack It's just a simple parody datapack, even though I'm late to the Merl meme
